title: 1-on-1 Remote Tech Training
headline: Learn securely and confidently at your pace.
description: Private online technology training for everyday users who want more confidence with computers, phones, internet safety, and common digital tools. Clear, patient instruction without jargon.
metaTitle: 1-on-1 Remote Tech Training Online | Defend I.T. Solutions
metaDescription: Private online tech training for beginners, seniors, families, and everyday users. Learn computer basics, safer online habits, passwords, backups, and common digital tasks with patient guidance.

sections.heading: Did You Know?
paragraph: Interactive, live training helps people retain knowledge and avoid common mistakes better than videos or self-guided tutorials.
Frustration with technology often comes from skipped steps or one-size-fits-all solutions. Personalized instruction focuses on what matters to you.
Simple missteps with devices or accounts are responsible for many privacy issues. A little training can go a long way in keeping you safe.

sections.heading: Who This Helps
paragraph: This service is for beginners, seniors, families, and everyday users who want patient, one-on-one help with the technology they actually use.
It is a good fit when you want practical digital confidence, safer online habits, and clear explanations instead of trying to piece everything together alone.

sections.heading: Popular Topics
items: Basic computer use, file organization, and safe web browsing
Windows, macOS, and smartphone navigation and settings
Email, cloud storage, and backup setup
Password managers, two-factor authentication, and account security
Cybersecurity for everyday users; how to stay safe online
Online shopping, banking, and scam detection
Digital hygiene and privacy for families, seniors, and beginners

sections.heading: How Sessions Work
paragraph: Sessions are held over Zoom with clear, step-by-step instruction tailored to your pace and goals.
We work with individuals, couples, and families. No technical background required.
There is no software to install, and no support plan is required. All you need is an internet connection and a willingness to learn.

internalLinks.label: Remote Privacy Hardening & Digital Safety Support

faq.question: Is this service only for beginners?
faq.answer: No, but it is especially useful for beginners and everyday users who want patient, one-on-one guidance with common technology tasks and safer online habits.

faq.question: Do I need a support plan for remote training?
faq.answer: No. Remote training is booked separately and does not require a remote support plan.

faq.question: Can you help seniors or family members who are not technical?
faq.answer: Yes. Sessions are designed to be clear, practical, and easy to follow for non-technical users.
